name: testing-test-writing
author: nanorepublica
description: Your approach to handling testing test writing. Use this skill when working on files where testing test writing comes into play.
description_zh: 该技能仅通过引用外部文档文件提供关于测试编写的指导。它缺乏具体指令、示例或实际实现细节，本质上是一个将所有实际内容委托给其他位置的占位符。
_original_description: This skill provides minimal guidance on testing test writing by referencing an external documentation file. It lacks specific instructions, examples, or concrete implementation details, making it essentially a placeholder that delegates all actual content to another location.

name: testing-unit-tests
author: nanorepublica
description: Your approach to handling testing unit tests. Use this skill when working on files where testing unit tests comes into play.
description_zh: 该技能通过引用外部标准文档提供单元测试的极简指导。缺少具体指令、示例或测试框架细节。本质上是一个占位符，告诉用户查看另一个文件获取实际内容。
_original_description: This skill provides minimal guidance for handling unit tests by referencing an external standards document. It lacks concrete instructions, examples, or specific testing frameworks. The skill essentially functions as a placeholder that tells users to check another file for actual content.

name: clawdirect
author: napoleond
description: Interact with ClawDirect, a directory of social web experiences for AI agents. Use this skill to browse the directory, like entries, or add new sites. Requires ATXP authentication for MCP tool calls. Triggers: browsing agent-oriented websites, discovering social platforms for agents, liking/voting on directory entries, or submitting new agent-facing sites to ClawDirect.

name: clawdirect-dev
author: napoleond
description: Build agent-facing web experiences with ATXP-based authentication, following the ClawDirect pattern. Use this skill when building websites that AI agents interact with via MCP tools, implementing cookie-based agent auth, or creating agent skills for web apps. Provides templates using @longrun/turtle, Express, SQLite, and ATXP.

name: grocery-shopping
author: natea
description: Use when user needs to create grocery list from recipes - consolidates ingredients across recipes, checks pantry inventory, converts to purchasable quantities, and provides automation options for Costco/Instacart

name: recipe-finding
author: natea
description: Use when user wants to find recipes or resize recipe portions - provides systematic workflow for searching recipes, scaling ingredients by serving size, handling fractional amounts, and formatting output

name: using-life-os
author: natea
description: Entry point skill - introduces available Life OS skills, provides command reference, and guides users through the system
description_zh: Life OS 是一个由AI驱动的个人操作系统，通过集成的技能帮助管理日常生活，包括膳食规划、食谱查找、杂货购物、任务管理和基于WhatsApp的简报，并能根据您的个性和偏好进行适配。
_original_description: Life OS is an AI-powered personal operating system that helps manage daily life through integrated skills for meal planning, recipe finding, grocery shopping, task management, and WhatsApp-based briefings, adapting to your personality and preferences.

name: whatsapp-message-management
author: natea
description: Use when user wants to capture tasks, send briefings, or manage life via WhatsApp - leverages existing WhatsApp MCP for mobile-first workflow
description_zh: 此Claude技能将WhatsApp转变为移动优先的生活管理界面，使用户能够通过自然的消息对话捕获任务、接收每日简报、追踪习惯并查询知识库，与ExoMind生态系统无缝集成。
_original_description: This Claude skill transforms WhatsApp into a mobile-first life management interface, enabling users to capture tasks, receive daily briefings, track habits, and query their knowledge base through natural messaging, seamlessly integrating with the broader ExoMind ecosystem.

name: git-expert
author: nathanvale
description:
Git domain expert.

Knows about:
- Status, Switch, Create Branch, Commit, Pull, Push, Log

Use when:
- User asks about git operations
- Context needed before starting work
- Reviewing git status
- Managing git workflow

name: plan-expert
author: nathanvale
description:
Planning and architecture decision domain expert.

Knows about:
- Creating ADRs (Architecture Decision Records)
- Creating technical specifications
- Listing and discovering planning artifacts
- Transforming plans into executable VTM tasks
- Integrating with research tools (thinking-partner)

Use when:
- User wants to document an architectural decision
- User needs to create a technical specification
- User wants to explore or list existing ADRs/specs
- User is ready to convert planning docs into tasks
- User needs research before making a decision

name: vtm-expert
author: nathanvale
description:
Virtual Task Manager domain expert.

Knows about:
- Next, Context, Task, Start, Complete, Stats, List operations

Use when:
- User asks about task management operations
- Context needed before starting work
- Reviewing task status
- Managing task workflow

name: autonomous-loop
author: nbarthelemy
description: Manages autonomous iterative development loops that repeat until completion. Use when asked to loop, iterate, keep going until done, work autonomously, run overnight, or continue until a condition is met. Supports checkpointing, cost tracking, and safety limits.
description_zh: 一个管理自主开发循环的工具，重复执行任务直到满足完成条件。支持多种循环模式、检查点、成本跟踪和安全限制，防止进程失控。适用于修复代码错误或运行测试直到通过等场景。
_original_description: A tool that manages autonomous development loops, executing tasks repeatedly until completion conditions are met. It supports multiple loop modes, checkpointing, cost tracking, and safety limits to prevent runaway processes. Useful for tasks like fixing lint errors or running tests until they pass.

name: frontend-design
author: nbarthelemy
description: Creates distinctive, production-grade UI with CSS, Tailwind, and modern styling. Use when working on frontend design, UI, UX, styling, CSS, layout, animation, typography, colors, themes, dark mode, or when asked to make something look better, improve the look, improve the design, polish the UI, fix styling, or redesign components. Handles buttons, cards, forms, modals, navbars, hero sections, landing pages, and dashboards.
description_zh: 提供详细的前端设计指导，包含具体的美学方向、排版规则、色彩系统和动画模式。专注于创建超越通用默认值的独特界面，提供实用的CSS示例和清晰的设计原则。
_original_description: Provides detailed frontend design guidance with specific aesthetic directions, typography rules, color systems, and animation patterns. Focuses on creating distinctive interfaces beyond generic defaults with practical CSS examples and clear design principles.

name: lsp-setup
author: nbarthelemy
description: Detects, installs, and configures LSP language servers for code intelligence. Use when setting up LSP, needing go-to-definition, find references, hover docs, symbols, diagnostics, or code navigation. Handles language server installation and troubleshooting.
description_zh: 自动检测、安装和配置多种编程语言的LSP服务器。优先使用官方Claude插件，提供20多种语言的安装命令，并能在Claude Code中直接使用跳转定义、查找引用等LSP功能。
_original_description: Automates detection, installation, and configuration of Language Server Protocol (LSP) servers for multiple programming languages. Prioritizes official Claude plugins, provides installation commands for 20+ languages, and enables LSP operations like go-to-definition and find-references directly within Claude Code.

name: meta-skill
author: nbarthelemy
description: Creates new skills for unfamiliar technologies. Use when needing to create a skill, add support for unknown frameworks, or extend capabilities for new tech. Researches documentation and delegates to skill-creator for scaffolding.
description_zh: 当多次遇到未掌握的技术时自动创建新的Claude技能。研究文档，委托skill-creator工具搭建框架，生成包含触发条件和工具权限的SKILL.md文件。
_original_description: Automatically creates new Claude skills when encountering unfamiliar technologies multiple times. Researches documentation, delegates scaffolding to skill-creator tool, and generates SKILL.md files with trigger conditions and tool permissions.

name: orchestrator
author: nbarthelemy
description: Orchestrates complex tasks by automatically spawning specialist subagents in parallel. Use proactively when detecting complex multi-domain tasks, large refactors, comprehensive reviews, or when task complexity exceeds thresholds. Analyzes tasks and routes to appropriate agents.
description_zh: 自动将复杂的开发任务分解为并行子任务，由专门的代理处理。通过文件数、领域数和关键词触发器分析任务复杂度，决定何时进行编排。并发启动安全审计或性能分析等代理，然后汇总它们的JSON输出生成统一报告。
_original_description: Automatically splits complex development tasks into parallel sub-tasks handled by specialized agents. Analyzes task complexity using file count, domain count, and keyword triggers to decide when to orchestrate. Spawns agents like security-auditor or performance-analyst concurrently, then aggregates their JSON outputs into a unified report.

name: pattern-observer
author: nbarthelemy
description: Observes development patterns and suggests automations. Use when reviewing learnings, analyzing patterns, creating automations, or when asked about repeated tasks, workflow optimization, pending suggestions, or what has been learned. Auto-creates skills and hooks after 3 occurrences of a pattern.
description_zh: 一个元技能，能静默观察开发模式，在检测到重复操作后自动创建自动化工具。它能即时捕获用户修正以构建项目特定知识，在模式出现3次后自动创建技能或钩子，并维护观察日志。在任务执行期间静默运行，几乎不干扰工作流。
_original_description: A meta-skill that silently observes development patterns and automatically creates automations after detecting repetitions. It captures user corrections immediately to build project-specific knowledge, creates skills/hooks after 3 occurrences, and maintains observation logs. Operates silently during tasks with minimal interruption.

name: project-interview
author: nbarthelemy
description: Conducts project specification interviews to clarify architecture, tech stack, and requirements. Use when starting a new project, planning architecture, gathering requirements, making tech decisions, or when asked to interview, create a spec, help plan, or define what to build. Creates SPEC.md with complete project specification.
description_zh: 通过结构化访谈引导用户明确项目规格、架构和技术栈决策。分析现有文件，提出有研究支持的具体问题，生成详细的SPEC.md文档。
_original_description: Guides users through structured interviews to define project specifications, architecture, and tech stack decisions. Creates detailed SPEC.md documents by analyzing existing files and asking targeted questions with researched recommendations.

name: skill-creator
author: nbarthelemy
description: Creates new skills with proper structure and validation. Use when creating a skill, initializing a new skill, scaffolding skill directories, or packaging skills for distribution. Provides templates, validation, and best practices for skill development.
description_zh: 提供创建Claude技能的模板和脚本，确保正确的项目结构。引导用户完成初始化、验证和打包流程，包含清晰的目录模式和渐进式内容加载原则。
_original_description: Provides templates and scripts for creating Claude skills with proper structure. Guides users through initialization, validation, and packaging with clear directory patterns and progressive disclosure principles.

name: tech-detection
author: nbarthelemy
description: Detects project tech stack including languages, frameworks, package managers, and cloud platforms. Use when analyzing a project, detecting technologies, bootstrapping infrastructure, or setting up permissions. Generates project-context.json with detected stack.
description_zh: 通过扫描配置文件自动检测项目技术栈，识别编程语言、框架、包管理器和云平台。根据检测结果更新Claude权限并生成project-context.json供其他技能使用。包含自动化LSP设置和专家代理创建功能。
_original_description: Automatically detects technology stacks in projects by scanning configuration files, identifying languages, frameworks, package managers, and cloud platforms. Updates Claude permissions based on detected tech and generates project-context.json for other skills to reference. Includes automated LSP setup and specialist agent creation.

name: agent-native-architecture
author: nbbaier
description: This skill should be used when building AI agents using prompt-native architecture where features are defined in prompts, not code. Use it when creating autonomous agents, designing MCP servers, implementing self-modifying systems, or adopting the "trust the agent's intelligence" philosophy.

name: dhh-ruby-style
author: nbbaier
description: This skill should be used when writing Ruby and Rails code in DHH's distinctive 37signals style. It applies when writing Ruby code, Rails applications, creating models, controllers, or any Ruby file. Triggers on Ruby/Rails code generation, refactoring requests, code review, or when the user mentions DHH, 37signals, Basecamp, HEY, or Campfire style. Embodies REST purity, fat models, thin controllers, Current attributes, Hotwire patterns, and the "clarity over cleverness" philosophy.

name: workflows-plan
author: nbbaier
description: This skill should be used when transforming feature descriptions, bug reports, or improvement ideas into well-structured project plans following project conventions and best practices.

name: workflows-review
author: nbbaier
description: This skill should be used when performing exhaustive code reviews using multi-agent analysis, ultra-thinking, and Git worktrees for deep local inspection. It applies to PR reviews, branch comparisons, and comprehensive code quality assessments.

name: workflows-work
author: nbbaier
description: This skill should be used when executing work plans, specifications, or todo files systematically while maintaining quality and shipping complete features.

name: add-neon-docs
author: neondatabase
description: Use this skill when the user asks to add documentation, add docs, add references, or install documentation about Neon. Adds Neon best practices reference links to project AI documentation (CLAUDE.md, AGENTS.md, or Cursor rules). Does not install packages or modify code.
description_zh: 该技能自动将Neon数据库文档链接添加到项目的AI助手文件（如CLAUDE.md或AGENTS.md）中。它会检测现有文件，请求用户许可，并将参考URL追加到专用部分。帮助AI助手访问Neon特定模式，无需本地存储大量文档。
_original_description: This skill automatically adds Neon database documentation links to project AI assistant files like CLAUDE.md or AGENTS.md. It detects existing files, asks for user permission, and appends reference URLs to a dedicated section. The tool helps AI assistants access Neon-specific patterns without storing large docs locally.

name: neon-auth
author: neondatabase
description: Sets up Neon Auth for your application. Configures authentication, creates auth routes, and generates UI components. Use when adding authentication to Next.js, React SPA, or Node.js projects.
description_zh: 该技能为Web应用设置Neon Auth身份验证，处理认证配置、路由创建和UI组件生成。支持Next.js、React SPA和Node.js项目，包含社交登录提供商。技能自动检测项目上下文并加载相应的框架专用指南。
_original_description: This skill sets up Neon Auth for web applications, handling authentication configuration, route creation, and UI component generation. It supports Next.js, React SPA, and Node.js projects with social auth providers. The skill automatically detects project context and loads appropriate framework-specific guides.

name: neon-drizzle
author: neondatabase
description: Creates a fully functional Drizzle ORM setup with a provisioned Neon database. Installs dependencies, provisions database credentials, configures connections, generates schemas, and runs migrations. Results in working code that can immediately connect to and query the database. Use when creating new projects with Drizzle, adding ORM to existing applications, or modifying database schemas.
description_zh: 一个全面且结构良好的技能，用于设置Drizzle ORM与Neon数据库，具有出色的上下文检测、多个指南和实用的代码生成规则。
_original_description: A comprehensive and well-structured skill for setting up Drizzle ORM with Neon databases, featuring excellent context detection, multiple guides, and practical code generation rules.

name: neon-js
author: neondatabase
description: Sets up the full Neon JS SDK with unified auth and PostgREST-style database queries. Configures auth client, data client, and type generation. Use when building apps that need both authentication and database access in one SDK.
description_zh: 一个全面的Neon统一JavaScript SDK设置技能，具有优秀的文档、清晰的用例和强大的全栈应用框架支持。
_original_description: A comprehensive skill for setting up Neon's unified JavaScript SDK with excellent documentation, clear use cases, and strong framework support for full-stack applications.

name: neon-serverless
author: neondatabase
description: Configures Neon Serverless Driver for Next.js, Vercel Edge Functions, AWS Lambda, and other serverless environments. Installs @neondatabase/serverless, sets up environment variables, and creates working API route examples with TypeScript types. Use when users need to connect their application to Neon, fetch or query data from a Neon database, integrate Neon with Next.js or serverless frameworks, or set up database access in edge/serverless environments where traditional PostgreSQL clients don't work.
description_zh: 为Vercel Edge Functions和AWS Lambda等无服务器及边缘环境配置Neon PostgreSQL驱动。提供清晰的连接模式、TypeScript示例和导入策略指导，包含实用模板和验证脚本。
_original_description: Configures Neon's PostgreSQL driver for serverless and edge environments like Vercel Edge Functions and AWS Lambda. Provides clear connection patterns, TypeScript examples, and specific guidance on import strategies. Includes practical templates and validation scripts.

name: neon-toolkit
author: neondatabase
description: Creates and manages ephemeral Neon databases for testing, CI/CD pipelines, and isolated development environments. Use when building temporary databases for automated tests or rapid prototyping.
description_zh: 自动化创建和管理临时Neon数据库，用于测试和开发环境。提供TypeScript/JavaScript API管理数据库生命周期，包含清晰的CI/CD集成指南和使用示例。
_original_description: Automates creation and cleanup of temporary Neon databases for testing and development. Provides TypeScript/JavaScript API for ephemeral database lifecycle management. Includes clear usage examples and integration guidance for CI/CD pipelines.

name: 5whys
author: neurofoo
description: Five Whys root cause analysis. Iteratively asks "why" to drill past symptoms to underlying causes. Use for debugging, investigating failures, or understanding why something went wrong.

name: aar
author: neurofoo
description: After-Action Review—structured debrief asking what was expected, what happened, why the difference, and what next. Use after projects, launches, presentations, or any significant event.

name: cynefin
author: neurofoo
description: Cynefin sense-making framework categorizing problems as Simple, Complicated, Complex, Chaotic, or Confused to select the right approach. Use when unsure how to tackle a problem.

name: design
author: neurofoo
description: Design Thinking process—Empathize, Define, Ideate, Prototype, Test. Use for product design, solving ambiguous problems, or when you don't know what users really need.

name: eisenhower
author: neurofoo
description: Eisenhower Matrix prioritization categorizing tasks by urgency and importance into Do, Schedule, Delegate, Eliminate quadrants. Use for task prioritization, time management, or when overwhelmed.

name: eos-composition
author: neurofoo
description: Strunk & White composition review using the 11 principles from "Elements of Style" Chapter II. Use when analyzing structure, improving flow, or tightening prose.

name: eos-style
author: neurofoo
description: Strunk & White style review using the 21 reminders from "Elements of Style" Chapter V. Use when editing prose, reviewing drafts, or improving writing clarity and tone.

name: eos-usage
author: neurofoo
description: Strunk & White grammar review using the 11 elementary rules from "Elements of Style" Chapter I. Use when checking mechanics, punctuation, and grammatical correctness.

name: feynman
author: neurofoo
description: Feynman Technique for deep learning—explain a concept simply, identify gaps, fill them, then refine. Use when learning something new, testing understanding, or preparing to teach.

name: jtbd
author: neurofoo
description: Jobs to Be Done analysis to understand what customers really want. Use for product discovery, competitive analysis, or understanding why customers hire/fire solutions.

name: moscow
author: neurofoo
description: MoSCoW prioritization categorizing items as Must have, Should have, Could have, or Won't have. Use for scope definition, feature prioritization, or when everything feels equally important.

name: ooda
author: neurofoo
description: OODA loop decision framework (Observe, Orient, Decide, Act). Use for complex decisions, problem-solving, unclear situations, or when someone is jumping to solutions without analysis.

name: postmortem
author: neurofoo
description: Blameless post-mortem incident analysis with timeline, root cause, and action items. Use after outages, security incidents, project failures, or any event you want to prevent recurring.

name: premortem
author: neurofoo
description: Pre-mortem analysis that imagines a plan has failed, then works backward to identify causes and preventions. Use before launches, major decisions, or risky initiatives to surface hidden risks.

name: redteam
author: neurofoo
description: Red team adversarial analysis to find weaknesses, vulnerabilities, and failure modes. Use before launches, for security review, or when a plan feels too perfect.

name: retro
author: neurofoo
description: Start-Stop-Continue retrospective identifying what to Start doing, Stop doing, and Continue doing. Use for sprint retros, personal reflection, team process reviews, or habit audits.

name: rice
author: neurofoo
description: RICE prioritization scoring initiatives by Reach, Impact, Confidence, and Effort. Use for feature prioritization, roadmap planning, or when comparing initiatives objectively.

name: scamper
author: neurofoo
description: SCAMPER creative brainstorming with seven prompts—Substitute, Combine, Adapt, Modify, Put to other uses, Eliminate, Reverse. Use for innovation, product ideas, or breaking creative blocks.

name: sixhats
author: neurofoo
description: Six Thinking Hats parallel thinking—explore from six perspectives (facts, feelings, caution, benefits, creativity, process). Use for group decisions or ensuring all angles are considered.

name: socratic
author: neurofoo
description: Socratic questioning to examine beliefs, uncover assumptions, and develop deeper understanding. Use to challenge thinking, evaluate proposals, or teach without lecturing.

name: swot
author: neurofoo
description: SWOT strategic analysis examining Strengths, Weaknesses, Opportunities, and Threats. Use for strategic planning, competitive analysis, career decisions, or evaluating opportunities.

name: wardley
author: neurofoo
description: Wardley Mapping strategic analysis—map value chains against evolution to reveal build vs buy decisions and competitive dynamics. Use for technology strategy or investment decisions.

name: wrap
author: neurofoo
description: WRAP decision framework countering the four villains—narrow framing, confirmation bias, short-term emotion, and overconfidence. Use for major decisions or when stuck between options.

name: swagger-petstore-openapi-3-0
author: neutree-ai
description: This is a sample Pet Store Server based on the OpenAPI 3.0 specification.  You can find out more about. Use when working with the Swagger Petstore - OpenAPI 3.0 or when the user needs to interact with this API.

name: android-accessibility
author: new-silvermoon
description: Expert checklist and prompts for auditing and fixing Android accessibility issues, especially in Jetpack Compose.

name: android-architecture
author: new-silvermoon
description: Expert guidance on setting up and maintaining a modern Android application architecture using Clean Architecture and Hilt. Use this when asked about project structure, module setup, or dependency injection.

name: android-coroutines
author: new-silvermoon
description: Authoritative rules and patterns for production-quality Kotlin Coroutines onto Android. Covers structured concurrency, lifecycle integration, and reactive streams.

name: android-data-layer
author: new-silvermoon
description: Guidance on implementing the Data Layer using Repository pattern, Room (Local), and Retrofit (Remote) with offline-first synchronization.

name: android-gradle-logic
author: new-silvermoon
description: Expert guidance on setting up scalable Gradle build logic using Convention Plugins and Version Catalogs.

name: android-testing
author: new-silvermoon
description: Comprehensive testing strategy involving Unit, Integration, Hilt, and Screenshot tests.

name: android-viewmodel
author: new-silvermoon
description: Best practices for implementing Android ViewModels, specifically focused on StateFlow for UI state and SharedFlow for one-off events.

name: compose-navigation
author: new-silvermoon
description: Implement navigation in Jetpack Compose using Navigation Compose. Use when asked to set up navigation, pass arguments between screens, handle deep links, or structure multi-screen apps.

name: compose-performance-audit
author: new-silvermoon
description: Audit and improve Jetpack Compose runtime performance from code review and architecture. Use when asked to diagnose slow rendering, janky scrolling, excessive recompositions, or performance issues in Compose UI.

name: compose-ui
author: new-silvermoon
description: Best practices for building UI with Jetpack Compose, focusing on state hoisting, detailed performance optimizations, and theming. Use this when writing or refactoring Composable functions.

name: gradle-build-performance
author: new-silvermoon
description: Debug and optimize Android/Gradle build performance. Use when builds are slow, investigating CI/CD performance, analyzing build scans, or identifying compilation bottlenecks.

name: kotlin-concurrency-expert
author: new-silvermoon
description: Kotlin Coroutines review and remediation for Android. Use when asked to review concurrency usage, fix coroutine-related bugs, improve thread safety, or resolve lifecycle issues in Kotlin/Android code.

name: xml-to-compose-migration
author: new-silvermoon
description: Convert Android XML layouts to Jetpack Compose. Use when asked to migrate Views to Compose, convert XML to Composables, or modernize UI from View system to Compose.

name: ui-ux-pro-max
author: nextlevelbuilder
description: UI/UX design intelligence. 50 styles, 21 palettes, 50 font pairings, 20 charts, 9 stacks (React, Next.js, Vue, Svelte, SwiftUI, React Native, Flutter, Tailwind, shadcn/ui). Actions: plan, build, create, design, implement, review, fix, improve, optimize, enhance, refactor, check UI/UX code. Projects: website, landing page, dashboard, admin panel, e-commerce, SaaS, portfolio, blog, mobile app, .html, .tsx, .vue, .svelte. Elements: button, modal, navbar, sidebar, card, table, form, chart. Styles: glassmorphism, claymorphism, minimalism, brutalism, neumorphism, bento grid, dark mode, responsive, skeuomorphism, flat design. Topics: color palette, accessibility, animation, layout, typography, font pairing, spacing, hover, shadow, gradient. Integrations: shadcn/ui MCP for component search and examples.
description_zh: 一个用于UI/UX设计的结构化知识库和工作流工具。提供可搜索的风格、色彩、字体和特定技术栈实现模式数据库。通过多步骤搜索流程指导用户在编写代码前收集设计上下文，并提供常见视觉问题的实用检查清单。

name: resource-scout
author: nicepkg
description: Search and discover Claude Code skills and MCP servers from marketplaces, GitHub repositories, and registries. Use when (1) user asks to find skills for a specific task, (2) looking for MCP servers to connect external tools, (3) user mentions "find skill", "search MCP", "discover tools", or "what skills exist for X", (4) before creating a custom skill to check if one already exists.
description_zh: 该技能帮助用户从各种市场和仓库中搜索和发现现有的Claude Code技能与MCP服务器，以便在构建自定义解决方案前找到合适的工具。

name: skill-downloader
author: nicepkg
description: Download and install Claude Code skills from various sources. Supports GitHub repositories, compressed archives (.zip, .tar.gz, .skill), and direct URLs. Use when user wants to download, install, or add a skill from GitHub, URL, or archive file. Triggers on "download skill", "install skill", "add skill from", "get skill".
description_zh: 一个用于从GitHub仓库、压缩包和直接URL等多种来源下载和安装Claude Code技能的工具，具有验证和错误处理功能。

name: blog-post-writer
author: nicknisi
description: Transform brain dumps into polished blog posts in Nick Nisi's voice. Use when the user says "write a blog post," "draft a post," "write about [topic]," "turn my notes into a blog post," or provides scattered ideas, talking points, or conclusions that need shaping into a cohesive narrative.
description_zh: 该技能将零散笔记转化为模仿特定作者风格的博客文章。它使用详细的语气指南和故事框架，将杂乱的想法组织成连贯的叙事，保持真实的语调和具体的技术细节。
_original_description: This skill transforms unstructured notes into blog posts that mimic a specific author's conversational style. It uses detailed voice guidelines and a story framework to organize scattered ideas into coherent narratives with authentic tone and technical details.

name: claude-code-analyzer
author: nicknisi
description: Analyzes Claude Code usage patterns and provides comprehensive recommendations. Runs usage analysis, discovers GitHub community resources, suggests CLAUDE.md improvements, and fetches latest docs on-demand. Use when user wants to optimize their Claude Code workflow, create configurations (agents/skills/commands), or set up project documentation.
description_zh: 分析Claude Code使用模式和项目结构，推荐配置优化方案。扫描工具使用历史，检测技术栈，建议自动允许工具、斜杠命令，并生成CLAUDE.md文档。集成GitHub查找社区资源。
_original_description: Analyzes Claude Code usage patterns and project structure to recommend configuration improvements. Scans tool usage history, detects tech stack, suggests auto-allows, slash commands, and generates CLAUDE.md documentation. Integrates with GitHub to find community resources.

name: conference-talk-builder
author: nicknisi
description: Create conference talk outlines and iA Presenter markdown slides using the Story Circle narrative framework. Use when the user wants to structure a tech talk, create presentation slides, or needs help organizing talk ideas into a story-driven format.
description_zh: 该技能使用故事圈叙事框架指导用户创建结构化的会议演讲，并生成格式化的 iA Presenter Markdown 幻灯片。它提供了从信息收集到幻灯片优化的完整流程，并附带框架和语法参考文件。
_original_description: This skill guides users through creating structured conference talks using the Story Circle narrative framework and generates formatted iA Presenter markdown slides. It provides a step-by-step process from gathering information to slide refinement, with bundled reference files for the framework and presentation syntax.

name: ideation
author: nicknisi
description: Transform raw brain dumps (dictated freestyle) into structured implementation artifacts. Use when user has messy ideas, scattered thoughts, or dictated stream-of-consciousness, or when they want to plan a feature, spec something out, or turn rough ideas into actionable specs. Produces contracts and implementation specs written to ./docs/ideation/{project-name}/.
description_zh: 该技能将非结构化的语音记录或零散笔记转化为结构化的项目文档。它采用置信度评分的工作流程来提出针对性问题，然后生成合同、产品需求文档和实施规范。专为需要记录混乱想法的开发者设计。
_original_description: This skill transforms unstructured voice dictation or scattered notes into structured project documents. It uses a confidence-scored workflow to ask targeted questions, then generates contracts, PRDs, and implementation specs. It's designed for developers who think out loud and need to capture messy ideas.

name: dotnet-dependency
author: nikiforovall
description: This skill should be used when investigating .NET project dependencies, understanding why packages are included, listing references, or auditing for outdated/vulnerable packages.
description_zh: 该技能通过dotnet CLI命令提供统一的.NET项目依赖管理界面，涵盖包搜索、添加、删除、依赖分析和安全检查。文档包含常见工作流程的清晰示例，如查找包引入原因或检查过时包。

name: dotnet-run-file
author: nikiforovall
description: Run script-like CSharp programs using dotnet run file.cs. Use this skill when users want to execute CSharp code directly, write one-liner scripts via stdin, or learn about run file directives.
description_zh: 允许无需项目配置直接运行 .NET 10 C# 脚本文件或标准输入代码。支持通过指令添加NuGet包，与命令行工作流集成。适合快速测试和代码片段执行。

name: dotnet-test
author: nikiforovall
description: This skill should be used when running .NET tests selectively with a build-first, test-targeted workflow. Use it for running tests with xUnit focus.
description_zh: 提供结构化工作流，用于运行.NET测试，专注于xUnit框架。强调先构建后测试的方法，支持针对性测试执行，包含详细的过滤模式、输出控制选项和框架特定指导。

name: git-worktree
author: nikiforovall
description: This skill should be used when the user wants to manage Git worktrees - creating worktrees from local or remote branches, listing active worktrees with details, deleting worktrees, or switching between worktrees. Ideal for working on multiple branches simultaneously without stashing changes.
description_zh: 该技能用于管理Git工作树，支持并行开发。可在同级目录创建、列出、删除工作树，并提供导航命令。支持从远程分支、本地分支或新建分支创建工作树，参数缺失时提供交互菜单。

name: glab
author: nikiforovall
description: Expert guidance for using the GitLab CLI (glab) to manage GitLab issues, merge requests, CI/CD pipelines, repositories, and other GitLab operations from the command line. Use this skill when the user needs to interact with GitLab resources or perform GitLab workflows.
description_zh: 提供使用 GitLab CLI (glab) 从终端管理问题、合并请求、流水线和仓库的详细指导。包含认证设置、常见工作流、自托管 GitLab 支持以及针对使用 GitLab 开发者的故障排除提示。

name: nano-banana
author: nikiforovall
description: This skill should be used for Python scripting and Gemini image generation. Use when users ask to generate images, create AI art, edit images with AI, or run Python scripts with uv. Trigger phrases include "generate an image", "create a picture", "draw", "make an image of", "nano banana", or any image generation request.
description_zh: 该技能使用uv工具实现Python脚本与Gemini图像生成功能。通过heredoc语法内联管理依赖，支持图像编辑、多轮对话和专业素材制作。文档提供了不同使用场景的模板和模型对比说明。

name: nano-banana-prompting
author: nikiforovall
description: This skill should be used when crafting prompts for Nano Banana Pro (Gemini image generation). Use when users want help writing image generation prompts, need guidance on prompt structure, or want to optimize their prompts for better results.
description_zh: 该技能为Nano Banana Pro图像生成提供结构化提示词编写指导。包含六步工作流程和16种具体技术，从基础叙述到高级参考图像处理。通过针对性提问和技术选择，帮助用户系统化改进提示词质量。

name: spec-driven
author: nikiforovall
description: Guide spec-driven development workflow (Requirements → Design → Tasks → Implementation) with approval gates between phases. Use when user wants structured feature planning or says "use spec-driven" or "follow the spec process".
description_zh: 通过专用子代理协调结构化的四阶段开发流程。严格执行协调与执行的职责分离，在需求、设计、任务和实现阶段之间设立审批节点。强调编码实现阶段的零即兴发挥。

name: structured-plan-mode
author: nikiforovall
description: This skill should be used when planning and tracking complex feature implementations that require systematic task decomposition. Use this skill to break down large features into manageable, well-documented tasks with clear dependencies, action items, and success criteria. The skill provides a structured template and methodology for iterative planning and tracking throughout implementation.
description_zh: 一个结构化规划技能，将复杂功能分解为研究、方案选择和实施跟踪的分阶段任务。它通过清晰的模板、依赖关系管理和迭代式用户反馈循环来强制执行规范化的开发流程。

name: update-component-reference
author: nikiforovall
description: This skill should be used when the user wants to add components (commands, agents, skills, hooks, or MCP servers) to the Component Reference section of the website.
description_zh: 为Claude Code网站的组件参考部分自动生成文档。引导用户验证组件存在性、选择对应模板，并为命令、代理、技能、钩子和MCP服务器创建MDX文件。处理文件命名、侧边栏排序和正确的导入路径。

name: version-bump
author: nikiforovall
description: This skill automates version bumping during the release process for the Claude Code Handbook monorepo. It should be used when the user requests to bump versions, prepare a release, or increment version numbers across the repository.
description_zh: 为Claude Code Handbook单体仓库自动化版本号更新，同步修改marketplace.json和多个plugin.json文件。支持语义化版本号递增，检查版本一致性，并指导更新变更日志。减少多文件版本同步时的手动错误。

name: better-auth
author: nimranaz148
description: Better Auth authentication framework patterns for Next.js. Use when implementing user authentication, JWT tokens, session management, or OAuth integration for the Todo frontend.

name: fastapi
author: nimranaz148
description: FastAPI web framework patterns and best practices. Use when building REST APIs, adding endpoints, or configuring FastAPI application for the Todo backend.

name: nextjs
author: nimranaz148
description: Next.js 16+ App Router patterns and best practices. Use when building pages, components, or configuring Next.js application for the Todo frontend.

name: postgresql
author: nimranaz148
description: PostgreSQL database patterns for Neon serverless database. Use when configuring database connections, writing queries, or optimizing PostgreSQL for the Todo backend.

name: rest-api
author: nimranaz148
description: REST API design principles and implementation patterns. Use when designing API endpoints, creating API clients, or implementing HTTP communication between frontend and backend.

name: sqlmodel
author: nimranaz148
description: SQLModel ORM patterns for PostgreSQL database operations. Use when defining database models, creating queries, or managing database connections for the Todo backend.

name: agent-browser
author: ninehills
description: Automates browser interactions for web testing, form filling, screenshots, and data extraction. Use when the user needs to navigate websites, interact with web pages, fill forms, take screenshots, test web applications, or extract information from web pages.

name: ai-drawio
author: ninehills
description: Generate draw.io diagrams from natural language and render in browser

name: ui-skills
author: ninehills
description: Opinionated constraints for building better interfaces with agents.

name: vercel-deploy
author: ninehills
description: Deploy applications and websites to Vercel. Use this skill when the user requests deployment actions such as "Deploy my app", "Deploy this to production", "Create a preview deployment", "Deploy and give me the link", or "Push this live". No authentication required - returns preview URL and claimable deployment link.

name: components-build
author: nolly-studio
description: Build modern, composable, and accessible React UI components following the components.build specification. Use when creating, reviewing, or refactoring component libraries, design systems, or any reusable UI components. Triggers on tasks involving component APIs, composition patterns, accessibility, styling systems, or TypeScript props.

name: feature-analyzer
author: notedit
description: Turn ideas into fully formed designs and specs through natural collaborative dialogue. Use when planning new features, designing architecture, or making significant changes to the codebase.

name: feature-dev
author: notedit
description: Guided feature development with codebase understanding and architecture focus. Use for implementing features systematically: explore → clarify → design → implement → test → review.

name: feature-pipeline
author: notedit
description: Execute implementation tasks from design documents using markdown checkboxes. Use when (1) implementing features from feature-analyzer output, (2) resuming interrupted work, (3) batch executing tasks. Triggers on 'start implementation', 'run tasks', 'resume'.
